name: The Border Grill's Cinco De Mayo Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 3 Ripe Haas avocados, peeled and mashed
1 small Red onion, peeled and diced
1 Jalapenos (or 2), seeds removed and chopped finely
Up to 2 bunches Cilantro leaves, washed, dried and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mash the avocados.
2. Dice the red onion.
3. Remove seeds from jalapenos and chop finely.
4. Roughly chop cilantro leaves (about 2 bunches).
5. Juice the limes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Mix all ingredients together well until combined.
